title: L'Odyssée de Port-Breton ou le rêve océanien du marquis de Rays
creator: Daniel Raphalen
notes: Likely definitive modern French monograph; difficult to acquire.

title: The Phantom Paradise: The Story of the Expedition of the Marquis de Rays
creator: Ugo Niau
notes: One of the few English-language book-length treatments.

title: La Nouvelle France
creator: Marquis de Rays / colonial enterprise
notes: Recruitment and propaganda newspaper for the colony.

title: Nouvelle-France: Colonie libre de Port-Breton, Océanie

notes: Promotional account useful for claims made to prospective settlers.

title: L'aventure de Port-Breton et la colonie libre dite Nouvelle-France
creator: A. Baudouin
notes: Contemporary account near the time of the disaster.

title: French trial and legal proceedings relating to the Marquis de Rays
creator: various
notes: Core source for the fraud prosecution and official findings.

title: Australian newspaper coverage in Trove
creator: various
notes: Coverage of survivors, trial, and New Italy settlement.

title: New Italy Museum and survivor materials
creator: various
